notes: Jumu'ah Salaah is at 1:30pm. No Salah to be performed 10 minutes before Zohr Start time. Programmes: Mon: Dars of Quran after Maghrib; Sun: Inspirations after Zohr; Thu: Durood program after Maghrib; Fri: Weekly dars of Hadeeth after Fajr; 2nd Sunday of the month: Program for Women after Zohr. Jama'at times are subject to change, therefore you are requested to check at the masjid.
